title: Henbrandt Pack of 3 Bubble Swords 4 Assorted Colours 55ml Kids Toys Summer Fun Children's Bubble Wands Beach and Garden Party Outdoor Games Bubbles for Kids Party Bag Fillers for Boys and Girls
features: Pack of 3 Bubble Wands for children.
These plastic bubble wands are fantastic summer fun for kids of all ages! Dip your bubble wand into the special bubble mixture and fill the sky with gorgeous shimmering bubbles to admire.
There are 4 assorted colours: Blue, Orange, Green, and Pink.
Recommended for children aged 3+ and not to be used without adult supervision.
description: Product description These fantastic bubble swords are a brilliant opportunity for outdoor summer fun in the garden, at the park, the beach and at BBQs. The bubble swords make great party favours, tombola prizes, classroom rewards, pocket money toys, and fun gifts for kids. Dip the wand in the bubble solution and either blow lightly through it or wave firmly to fill the air with giant iridescent bubbles, then admire them as they float upwards and away or chase after them before they pop! How many bubbles can you create? The bubble sticks measure approx. 22.5cm / 9inches in length and there are four colours: Blue, Orange Green, and Pink. Each bubble sword contains 55ml of bubble solution and a bubble wand is included within the tube. Recommended for use outside, as bubble solution may stain some fabrics – take appropriate precautions if using bubbles indoors. Not suitable for children under the age of 3 and do not leave children unsupervised with bubble mix. This product carries the UKCA mark and has been tested to EN71 safety standards, complying with all applicable safety requirements. Indications Outdoor summer fun, parties, entertainment for children, party favors, classroom rewards, gifts for children, not suitable for children under 3, requires adult supervision Safety Warning Choking hazard, Small parts.
